description: The DepthProjectionMaterial is commonly used when importing depth videos and acts as a material that displaces vertices in 3D.
usage: The material uses a file that has a greyscale video (representing depth at each pixel) and a normal color video in order to "overlay" the color info on top of the 3D distortion created by the greyscale input. There are texture2D slots for depth and color, meaning two separate files could be used given the DepthTextureOffset property is set to 0.
